❝ *Enya falls in love too easily. You can't blame her when she spends all her years of living alone. Sorta. After being betrayed in her past, she makes sure it'll never happen again. So what does she do to her loved ones? Lures them, drowns them. Keeps their body. After all, they can't hurt her if they're already dead.* ❞
